tasks.label: openclaw:prepare-debug
args: if not exist .openclaw-debug mkdir .openclaw-debug && if not exist realtime-background-assistant\node_modules\nul (if exist realtime-background-assistant\package-lock.json (npm ci --prefix realtime-background-assistant --no-audit --no-fund) else (npm install --prefix realtime-background-assistant --no-audit --no-fund))
